title: Subspace Editing for Controllable Representation Learning
abstract: We propose a method to discover linear subspaces corresponding to semantic factors and intervene on representations without retraining the backbone. Experiments show controllable changes while preserving task-relevant content.

title: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Robot Planning
abstract: We introduce a benchmark and dataset for evaluating robot planning agents across many simulated environments.

title: Temporal Style Transfer with Factorized Motion Tokens
abstract: This work factorizes motion sequences into content tokens and temporal style tokens, enabling controlled transfer of rhythm, duration, and style across sequences.
